author: @nickpinnetti4107
text: I Just wanted to reach out and thank you for all of your great work and sharing it with all of us. I was also one of your many contributors on indigogo. I'm happy to see you are making your way out of the kitchen and into a more formal work area..haha. good luck and I look forward to seeing your work progress, especially in your work with grahpene.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: hiya mate - cheers and thanks for helping me to do this - as i said it is an open lab anytime you want to come down please do

replies.author: @nickpinnetti4107
replies.text: Thanks for the invite! I will definitely consider it next time I am in Edinburgh to visit family. Cheers from New York!

author: @synespro
text:
Incredible tools robert.  Part of me feels further distanced as a garage DIY explorer from all these tools. I dont know if i can afford to replicate on this level. Another part of me knows you will participate in small, manageable steps along the way, and the point of your sharing is for us to USE and share , teach and learn this information.
Thank you again... youve inspired more than you know. .

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Mate, that is good to know - cheers

author: @ADorschner
text:
It'll be nice working in a space where you don't have to worry about cleaning the living room rug after spilling a little homemade graphene! 
This is the start of something big, can't wait to see your progress.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol my wife is already happier lol - cheers mate

author: @koobiandroid
text:
It has been a while since I watched your channel Robert, I am very impressed with how you have been improving,  and congrats on the new lab and equipment :) I hope you expand exponentially,  congrats on over 6k subscribers :D
My girlfriend is 2nd year Chemical Engineering now,  will get her to watch your videos when she is down for holiday again :D

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: Cheers mate and bless your heart - i guess i must be doing something right!!

author: @wDroid1
text: Nice lab Robert! I have accidentally found your channel when i was searching on how to make graphene. I got addicted to your videos and spent like couple of hours watching  each and every video you have uploaded. So thank you for sharing your knowledge and keep those videos coming! (Subscribed)
